images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol‑style model, 20 years old, in a bright convenience‑store aisle mid‑swing of a sleek pink golf club. She wears an oversized white boyfriend shirt, its loose buttons open just enough to hint at a silk lace bralette beneath, paired with high‑waist black leggings and white sneakers; the shirt’s hem flutters with the motion, exposing a sliver of her taut midriff and the curve of her ample chest. Soft fairy‑light bokeh glows behind her, casting a dreamy pink haze over the pastel‑colored snack shelves. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, the eye‑level perspective captures her large expressive eyes looking innocently at the viewer, a subtle smile on her lips, while depth of field, ray‑tracing and global illumination create photorealistic lighting and crisp texture.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol/influencer, 20‑21 years old, perched on a narrow earthen path cutting through a golden rice‑paddy field bathed in the warm glow of blue‑hour light. She wears a delicate ivory silk slip dress, thin straps slipping off her shoulders, the fabric clinging to her fit yet curvy shape, a subtle lace hem flirting with the breeze. Straight black hair frames her face, a few strands illuminated by the low sun. Mid‑laugh, her eyes sparkle, cheeks flushed, lips full and glistening, a lazy half‑smile revealing a sluggish, dreamy confidence. The background yields a creamy bokeh of lush green stalks and a rustic steampunk windmill, pastel‑orange sky softly fading. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑tracing, global illumination, warm golden color grade, ultra‑sharp skin texture, realistic pores, cinematic composition.8k photo, Large breasts
